raw_consumer_statement: On XXXX we ordered a home inspection on XXXX. Whilst the inspection was ongoing we had to cancel because of realtor malpractice. We were unable to reach the inspector who at that time was tresspassing. The inspection company on XXXX stated they would provide a cancellation and refund. However, later on this was recanted. For this reason we requested a dispute with Barclays to obtain our refund. Barclays ruled against us and charged us again on XXXX. Barclays never requested documentation or provided us with an opportunity to support our case. Barclays failed in their duty towards us as card holders. Furthermore, for a repeal we need to physically mail in documentation. It appears merchants have access to digital means. This appears to be designed to the detriment of card holders. We will send in our evidence in the mail.
